properties.data_description: Raw video file (300-500 MB) containing the meeting recording, uploaded by the user
properties.name: Meeting video file upload

properties.data_description: Complete timestamped transcript with speaker labels (who said what at which minute/second), delivered to the user for download
properties.name: Verbatim speaker-attributed transcript

properties.data_description: Structured meeting protocol: participants list, discussion topics, decisions made, action items with assignees and deadlines, delivered to the user for download
properties.name: Meeting protocol

properties.data_description: Extracted audio stream (or reference to stored file) sent to the ASR/diarization engine for processing
properties.name: Audio data for transcription

properties.data_description: Transcript segments returned by ASR/diarization: each contains speaker ID, start/end timestamps, and spoken text
properties.name: Speaker-attributed transcript segments

properties.data_description: Full verbatim transcript with speaker labels sent to the LLM for extraction of topics, decisions, action items
properties.name: Transcript text for protocol generation

properties.data_description: Structured meeting protocol returned by the LLM: participants, topics, decisions, action items with assignees and deadlines
properties.name: Generated meeting protocol

properties.data_description: Raw video/audio binary written to object storage for durable retention during asynchronous processing
properties.name: Video file write to storage

properties.data_description: Video or extracted audio file retrieved from object storage to be passed to the ASR/diarization engine
properties.name: Video file retrieval from storage
